_meta.description: Hand-crafted recorded LLM responses for a synthetic 3-block email used by test_pipeline_integration.py. The shapes match what each stage's call_llm_json helper would receive from gpt-5.x. Replace with truly recorded fixtures (saved from a live API run) before the v1 ship gate.
_meta.plain_body:
Hi {{firstName}}.

We help small firms grow their practice.

Talk soon.
